recommended_config_reason: 1.53x speedup with no visible quality degradation on visual inspection. K3_periodic achieves 2.12x but shows severe composition loss. IS-at-20-steps is insufficient signal; visual check is required.
timing_caveat: B200 timing std often exceeds median. Numbers are directionally correct (consistent with FLOP-skip predictions) but not precision measurements. Use median values only.
quality_caveat: IS measured at 20 steps with 128 images is too coarse. IS drop thresholds passing does not guarantee visual quality. FID-50K at 100 steps needed for paper.
